title: Webhook not triggering in production mode
symptom: The webhook URL works in test mode but does not trigger the workflow in production, despite the external service indicating a successful request.
applies_when: Workflow is set to production mode
root_cause: n8n distinguishes between test and production webhook URLs. The test URL only functions when the workflow is manually executed, while the production URL requires the workflow to be active to trigger correctly.
fix_steps: Ensure you are using the Production URL for the webhook
Activate the workflow by turning it ON
agent_instruction: Use the Production URL and ensure the workflow is active.
